hero.headline: Premium Home Furniture
hero.description: Partner with HomeStyle Furniture — China's trusted B2B manufacturer of computer desks, ergonomic chairs, coffee tables, and storage solutions. OEM/ODM available. 60+ countries served.

whyChooseUs.headline: Why Global Buyers Choose HomeStyle
whyChooseUs.subheadline: Trusted by 500+ distributors across 60 countries for quality, reliability, and partnership.

reasons.title: ISO 9001 Certified
reasons.description: Rigorous quality management system ensures consistent product quality across every batch.

reasons.title: 50,000 m² Factory
reasons.description: State-of-the-art manufacturing facility with full in-house production capabilities.

reasons.title: OEM / ODM Services
reasons.description: Full custom manufacturing with your brand, designs, and specifications. No order too unique.

reasons.title: On-Time Delivery
reasons.description: 98.5% on-time delivery rate backed by dedicated production scheduling and logistics coordination.

reasons.title: Global Export Experience
reasons.description: Experienced with all major import regulations including US, EU, Australian, and GCC market requirements.

reasons.title: Dedicated Support
reasons.description: Dedicated account managers available via email, WhatsApp, and video call for every client.

factory.headline: State-of-the-Art Manufacturing
factory.subheadline: Visit our 50,000 m² facility in Foshan, Guangdong — the furniture capital of the world.
factory.description: Founded in 2005, our factory combines traditional craftsmanship with modern CNC technology, automated finishing lines, and rigorous quality control at every stage of production.

process.headline: From Concept to Container
process.subheadline: Our streamlined production process ensures quality at every step.

steps.title: Inquiry & Quotation
steps.description: Submit your requirements. Receive a detailed quotation within 24 hours.

steps.title: Sample Development
steps.description: We develop samples to your specifications for approval before bulk production.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: Full-scale manufacturing with quality checks at every production stage.

steps.title: QC Inspection
steps.description: Pre-shipment inspection by our QC team. Third-party inspection available.

steps.title: Export & Shipping
steps.description: Professional export packing, booking, and shipping documentation.

steps.title: After-Sales Support
steps.description: Dedicated after-sales service to ensure your complete satisfaction.

certifications.headline: Certified Quality You Can Trust
certifications.subheadline: Our certifications reflect our commitment to quality, safety, and ethical manufacturing.

catalogCTA.headline: Download Our Full Product Catalog
catalogCTA.subheadline: Get instant access to our complete product range with specifications, pricing guidelines, and MOQ details.

contactCTA.headline: Ready to Start Your Order?
contactCTA.subheadline: Contact our sales team today for a personalized quotation and product recommendations.
